- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up drawing shows a cartoon face with large curved bangs and two dark, eye-like shapes on a light background.

The main subject is a stylized anime-like head and face filling most of the frame, with short, blunt dark outlines around the cheeks and chin. The character has two curved bangs framing the forehead, a small nose area suggested by minimal linework, and a simple mouth line near the bottom center. The eyes appear as dark, rectangular-to-trapezoid shapes with lighter horizontal highlights inside each eye; the left eye is slightly more centered, while the right eye sits higher and is partially covered by the hair shape.

The setting is unclear because the image appears to be a cropped illustration rather than a real-world scene.

The visual style is monochrome with black line art and gray shading on a mostly white background. The lighting appears flat, consistent with a graphic drawing. The camera angle is directly facing the face, tightly cropped so only the head and upper hair are visible. Thin curved lines around the forehead and hair edges define the hairstyle, and a few scribble-like lines appear near the top left edge of the frame.

No important visible text detected.

This image is a close-up of a stylized cartoon/anime face with dark eye shapes and simple facial features. The hair is drawn as thick curved bangs, and the illustration is cropped tightly around the head.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
